name: Jethro Monroe / Clinical 16-bit v6.1
description: SURGICAL FIX: Forced Centroid Displacement. Three hard-coded overrides to stretch Lab phase space: (1) Deterministic Blue Anchor at L=40, a=5, b=-45 (hard-locked slot for rectangle). (2) EXTREME Lightness Priority lWeight=20.0 (Halftone Killer - forces halftone dots onto tonal plates, declares 'I don't care if fur is blue-ish, it is DARK and belongs on Gray/Black plate'). (3) Neutral Kill Zone neutralCentroidClampThreshold=15.0 (physically deletes a*b* color data from non-vibrant pixels - turns halftone fur to pure grayscale BEFORE engine starts). Goal: Stretch distance between fur (dark halftone) and blue (solid rectangle) to force distinct membership.
